debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
X : Set α
hX : Maximal (fun X => @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G - X.encard) X
⊢ 2 * @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = (G.vertexSet \ X).encard - encard (@Graph.OddComponents α β (G - X))

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : ∀ (x : α), x ∈ X → False := by
    intro x hx
    have h₂ := hX
    simp [Maximal] at h₂
    have h₃ := h₂ (X.erase x) (by
      -- Prove that X.erase x is a subset of X
      apply Set.erase_subset
    )
    simp_all [Set.ext_iff, Set.erase_eq_iff, Finset.card_erase_of_mem]
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Graph.MatchingNumber, Graph.OddComponents]
        <;>
        omega
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  have h₂ : X = ∅ := by
    apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
    intro x hx
    have h₃ := h₁ x hx
    contradiction
  simp_all [Set.ext_iff, Finset.card_empty]
  <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Graph.MatchingNumber, Graph.OddComponents]
      <;>
      omega
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      aesop
    })

have h₁ : ∀ x ∈ X, ν(G - (X \ {x})) = ν(G) - (X \ {x}).encard := by
    intro x hx
    apply hX.not_max_within
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Set.sdiff_singleton_eq, Finset.card_sdiff, Finset.card_singleton]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Set.sdiff_singleton_eq, Finset.card_sdiff, Finset.card_singleton]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>

    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try aesop)

  have h₂ : 2 * ν(G - X) = (V(G) \ X).encard - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
    have h₃ : ∀ x ∈ X, ν(G - (X \ {x})) = ν(G) - (X \ {x}).encard := h₁
    have h₄ : 2 * ν(G - X) = (V(G) \ X).encard - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
      -- Use the odd components to derive the required equation
      -- This is a placeholder for the actual proof steps
      have h₅ := h₃
      have h₆ : 2 * ν(G - X) = (V(G) \ X).encard - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
        -- Introduce a contradiction to close the proof
        have h₇ : False := by
          -- Use the maximality of X to derive a contradiction
          have h₈ := hX.max
          have h₉ := hX.not_max_within
          -- This is a placeholder for the actual contradiction derivation
          exfalso
          tauto
        -- If we reach here, we have a contradiction, and the statement is vacuously true
        exfalso
        exact h₇
      exact h₆
    exact h₄
  exact h₂
